heading: Application
label: 10901 Application
text: This chapter applies to a vessel of the United States except a fishing or whaling vessel or a yacht.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1090146:65346:65446:65546:65646:658Section 10901 provides that chapter 109 applies to all vessels of the United States except fishing vessels, whaling vessels or yachts.
